title: July Fleet Auction
description: Mixed fleet disposal featuring hatchbacks, saloons and SUVs from corporate lease returns. Ideal for trade buyers and value-focused purchasers seeking volume lots with transparent service history and independent inspections available on site.

title: Premium Electric Vehicle Catalogue
description: Curated selection of premium battery-electric vehicles from leading manufacturers. All lots include battery health reports and remaining warranty documentation.

title: Commercial & Light Fleet Sale
description: Vans, pickups and light commercial vehicles from Danish fleet operators. Physical inspection available at Copenhagen logistics hub.

title: Summer Luxury Collection
description: Hand-picked premium vehicles from BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche and Audi. Provenance verified. Concierge viewing appointments available for registered bidders throughout the sale window.

title: Nearly New Warehouse Clearance
description: Low-mileage ex-demonstrator and management vehicles. Most lots under 15,000 km with full manufacturer warranty remaining.

title: Autumn Preview — Catalogue Building
description: Upcoming sale catalogue currently being assembled. Register your interest to receive notification when lots are published.

title: Exclusive Electric Hypercars
description: An exclusive private collection of modern performance prototypes and electric concepts. Invitation only.

title: Private Collector Showcase
description: Invitation-only collector sale featuring rare European performance vehicles.
